---
title: "Predictive Model Comparison"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

This chart compares predictive performance across offences and models. Use the dropdown to switch between RMSE, MAE, and R².

```{python}
import pandas as pd
from shared_viz import build_model_compare_df, make_model_comparison_chart

# Assumed input files generated by EDA_Analysis_notebook or included in the github repo:
# - data/basic_model_results.csv: naive baseline + linear regression results
# - data/tree_results.csv: regression tree results
# - data/rf_test_results.csv: tuned random forest test results
# - data/xgb_test_results.csv: tuned XGBoost test results

results_df = pd.read_csv("data/basic_model_results.csv")
tree_results_df = pd.read_csv("data/tree_results.csv")
rf_test_results_df = pd.read_csv("data/rf_test_results.csv")
xgb_test_results_df = pd.read_csv("data/xgb_test_results.csv")

model_compare_df = build_model_compare_df(
    results_df,
    tree_results_df,
    rf_test_results_df,
    xgb_test_results_df,
)

fig = make_model_comparison_chart(model_compare_df)
fig
```

 **Caption.** Interactive comparison of predictive model performance across offence types.
